ocean.name: Big Five (OCEAN)
ocean.instructions:
Reply with a number from **1 to 5**:
1: Strongly Disagree
2: Disagree
3: Neutral
4: Agree
5: Strongly Agree

questions.q: I see myself as someone who is curious about many different things.
I see myself as someone who is thorough in my work.
I see myself as someone who is talkative.
I see myself as someone who is helpful and unselfish with others.
I see myself as someone who worries a lot.
I see myself as someone who has an active imagination.
I see myself as someone who tends to be disorganized.
I see myself as someone who is full of energy.
I see myself as someone who has a forgiving nature.
I see myself as someone who is relaxed, handles stress well.
I see myself as someone who values artistic, aesthetic experiences.
I see myself as someone who is dependable.
I see myself as someone who is outgoing, sociable.
I see myself as someone who is generally trusting.
I see myself as someone who gets nervous easily.
I see myself as someone who is ingenious, a deep thinker.
I see myself as someone who can be somewhat careless.
I see myself as someone who is reserved.
I see myself as someone who is considerate and kind to almost everyone.
I see myself as someone who stays calm in tense situations.
I see myself as someone who prefers work that is routine.
I see myself as someone who follows through with plans.
I see myself as someone who is sometimes shy, inhibited.
I see myself as someone who is sometimes rude to others.
I see myself as someone who is depressed, blue.

mbti.name: MBTI (16 Personalities)
mbti.instructions: For each question, select the option that feels most natural to you.

questions.q: At a party, do you:
questions.b: Interact with a few, known to you (I)

questions.q: Are you more:
Is it worse to:
questions.a: Have your head in the clouds (S)

questions.q: Are you more impressed by:
Are you more drawn toward the:
Do you prefer to work:
Do you tend to choose:
In your social groups, are you:
Do you prefer:
Are you more:
Which is a higher compliment:
In making decisions, do you rely more on:
Are you more comfortable with:
Do you prefer things to be:
Do you consider yourself:
Do you prefer to focus on:
Do you value more in yourself:
Is it your way to:
Do you prefer to:
Are you more comfortable with:

enneagram.name: Enneagram (RHETI)
enneagram.instructions: Reply with a number from **1 to 5** based on how accurately the statement describes you.

questions.q: I have a strong sense of right and wrong.
I hold myself to high standards.
I feel most fulfilled when I am helping others.
I often put others' needs before my own.
I am highly motivated by success.
I set ambitious goals and work hard to achieve them.
I feel fundamentally different from other people.
I value authenticity above all else.
I prefer to observe rather than participate.
I seek to understand how things work.
I am always thinking about what could go wrong.
I value loyalty and commitment.
I am always looking for new experiences.
I get bored easily with routine.
I take charge in group settings.
I dislike feeling controlled by others.
I go along with others to keep the peace.
I avoid conflict whenever possible.
